examples: I grew up around people who had wonderful, mellifluous voices.
He can whisper mellifluous nothings in my ear.
Soon the room is filled with Bates' mellifluous tones.
Very few people have voices so mellifluous that they can make a million dollars a year doing voiceovers for TV commercials.
It's worth noting, though, that all of these PCs had broadband Internet connections--a dial-up modem would likely provide a far less mellifluous conversation.
